name: 17p11_2_distal_LCR
description: Distal LCR17p subset — flanking SD blocks on the distal side of the SMS-REPs, mediating atypical larger ~5 Mb 17p11.2 deletions that extend telomeric of the canonical Smith-Magenis interval. Some atypical 17p11.2 SMS-like deletions use these LCRs as one breakpoint.

architecture.internal_structure: Distal LCR17pA, B, C modules of ~100-200 kb at ~98% identity; share TRIM16 and ALOX12 paralog cores with proximal SMS-REPs.
